summary: Completed testing of server.py refactor (deps.py extraction), municipal subscription €50/month, and app icon updates. All 14 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Backend starts successfully after refactor. App icon (yellow square with poop emoji) correctly displayed in header, login page, and register page.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns ok (backend starts after deps.py refactor)
POST /api/auth/register requires username field (returns 422 without it)
GET /api/reports returns reports with freshness labels (Fresca/En proceso/Fósil)
GET /api/notifications returns list for authenticated user
Frontend loads with app icon (icon-32x32.png) in header
Login page shows custom app icon (icon-64x64.png), not MapPin icon
Register page shows custom app icon (icon-64x64.png)
Subscription page lists all 10 premium features
Map legend shows updated freshness labels (<48h/2-6 days/>6 days)
Favicon and PWA manifest updated with new icon sizes (48x48, 128x128, 192x192, 512x512)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users: admin@cacaradar.es (premium), corstest@test.com (free), madrid@cacaradar.es (municipality)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server.py refactor complete - shared dependencies (DB, auth, models, utilities) extracted to deps.py (~251 lines). server.py reduced from ~2120 to ~1863 lines. All route endpoints remain in server.py. Municipality subscription price updated from €49 to €50/month. App icon files added: icon-{16,32,48,64,128,192,512}x{size}.png and favicon.ico. PWA manifest updated with new icon sizes. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_features.py covers all refactor and new feature scenarios.

verified_features.deps_py_extraction: PASS - Shared dependencies imported from deps.py
